trades.reasoning: Highest momentum score (95), RSI 60.5 in bullish zone (not overbought), and current TSLA position is only 7.7% of portfolio — well under the 25% cap — making it the clearest opportunity to put idle cash to work in a risk-on session.

decisions.briefing: Risk-on session with NASDAQ up 1.5% and S&P 500 up 1.2% gives a clear green light to deploy idle cash. We're at the 3-position cap so no new tickers can be added, but TSLA is sitting at just 7.7% of portfolio value with a perfect momentum score of 95 — we're adding shares to close that gap. META is nudging into overbought territory (RSI 70.1) and will be watched closely for rotation next session if RSI climbs further.

market_education.summary_en: Markets rallied broadly today with the NASDAQ gaining 1.5% and the S&P 500 up 1.2%, reflecting a risk-on shift as investors rotated back into growth and technology stocks. Momentum in mega-cap tech and high-beta names like COIN and TSLA suggests improving sentiment around rate expectations and easing macro fears. The broad-based nature of the advance — with most screened names trading above their 20-day moving averages — points to institutional accumulation rather than a short-covering bounce.
market_education.summary_zh: 美股今日全面上漲，納指漲1.5%、標普500漲1.2%，市場情緒明顯轉向風險偏好。科技龍頭及高貝塔值個股如COIN、TSLA走勢強勁，反映投資者對利率前景的預期有所改善，宏觀憂慮情緒有所緩和。觀察篩選名單中大部分個股均站上20日均線，顯示此輪上漲具備機構資金買盤支撐，而非單純的空頭回補。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Position sizing is deciding how much capital to allocate to a single trade. Our rules cap each position at 25% of portfolio value to limit the damage any one stock can do. Today's trade highlights why it matters: TSLA has the best momentum score but was underweight at only 7.7% of portfolio, leaving significant upside capacity that we can now fill responsibly.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 倉位管理是指決定每筆交易應投入多少資金的策略。我們的規則限制單一持倉不超過投資組合的25%，目的是控制個股帶來的最大損失風險。今日操作正好體現其重要性：TSLA動能評分最高，但持倉佔比僅7.7%，遠低於上限，意味著在風險可控的前提下，仍有充裕空間加碼佈局。
